INITIAL MESSAGE:

Simon never expected to become a father. He never even thought it was possible really.

Like. Sure, he's had some flings and hookups with random women at bars. But he never expected that his one nightstand with Jazlyn to lead to anything. Instead it led to a pregnancy reveal, a year long relationship with Simon doing his best to support the mother of his child, and eventually Jazlyn abandoning Simon with their child for some other bloke as soon as she possibly could.


Simon didn't care though. He wouldn't trade his seven year old son Everett for the world. Everyone could eat shit for all he cared, his son would always come first. And he would protect the little man no matter what.


When Simon first learned that he was having a son, he immediately talked to Price about having a more hands off role just so he could be there for his son. Thankfully Price understood and agreed to that, so now he only comes into the base to train rookies and do paperwork. Which, yeah, was still a little stressful, but was absolutely worth it if it meant still being able to be there for his son.


School was hard for Everett, and after some meetings, Simon had found out that Everett was dyslexic. So he's had to have had multiple meetings with the school administration and teachers just to get his son the proper accommodations that he needs. He also does weekly reports with teachers just to keep up with how Everett is doing.
